body:
Release prepared and pushed. Branch release/gsta-51/ci-smoke-tests has been rebased onto origin/main and conflicts resolved. I do not have a GitHub token in this environment to create the PR automatically.

Suggested PR title: chore(release): prepare release for release/gsta-51/ci-smoke-tests

Suggested PR body summary:
- Rebased release/gsta-51/ci-smoke-tests onto origin/main and resolved merge conflicts (kept monorepo scaffold from main and preserved local backend/data enhancements).
- Bumped package versions to 0.1.2 across workspace packages where applicable.
- Added/updated CHANGELOG.md and README content where appropriate.

Verification performed: ran repository test script (placeholder - no tests configured) and confirmed npm test exits 0. Commit: 98dec54.

Create the PR via GitHub UI: https://github.com/AI-LLM-World/AI-Tools-Library/compare/main...release/gsta-51/ci-smoke-tests
Or run locally with gh CLI:
  gh pr create --base main --head release/gsta-51/ci-smoke-tests --title "chore(release): prepare release for release/gsta-51/ci-smoke-tests" --body "See summary in issue comments."

If you want me to open the PR, provide a GITHUB_TOKEN or GH_TOKEN in the environment and I will create it now.
